notifications.eyecare-break-body: Focus on an object 20 feet away for 20 seconds.
notifications.eyecare-break-finished-body: Your eyes are rested. You can return to your screen.

eyecare-active-duration.description: Active screen time before triggering a break (minutes)
eyecare-active-duration.label: Active Duration

eyecare-sound.description: Play notification sound when breaks start or finish
eyecare-sound.label: Enable Audio Feedback
